foreignObject.div:
Awkward
Excuse me ma'am,-

Quiet Delicate music at Low
intensity
[Slow transition]

Hasn't touched her soup yet
Mmmm?
My apologies.

I believe that I were to be
be assisting you? With..-

Completely calm
Ah yes, sorry about that dear.

Taking a seat next to her
Nah nah, don't worry.

Scooping up a spoonful of soup
I really should be the one
apologizing.

Holding her hand up
Don't bother dear, it's absolutely
fine.

Trying to be polite
Haha, thanks.

None
. . .

Normal Delicate music at Medium
intensity
[Slow transition]

In between mouthfuls
So,{0.3} how's your day going?

div.i:
(The soup is reduced a little
from full. The ingredients
floating on top have changed.)

foreignObject.div:
Feeding another spoonful
It's good.
How about you?
I'm fine dear.

None
. . .

Slightly curious
Do you wear that cloak often?
If you don't mind me asking?

Caught slighty by surprise
Oh yeah, yeah.
I wear it everyday.
Oh really now?{0.3} Why?

Forthright
Well, it has big pockets.-

It protects me from the sun,
the rain,-

I can use it as a blanket,
or a mat.-
It's useful.

Preplexed
Wouldn't a coat do the same?

Shrugging
Eh, you can't really wear sleeves
in this kind of climate.

Satisfied
Ah I see.

Reminiscing
I used to wear a cloak too.

Gazing away wistfully
When I was out on the farm.

div.i:
(The soup is at a medium level
in the bowl. There is no more
steam rising from the bowl
(transition occurs after the
first ‘.’))

foreignObject.div:
None
. . .

Looking back at me
Can you do me a favor?

Cooling another spoonful
Sure ma'am.

Earnest
Can you send my compliments
to the chef?
I'm quite enjoying this.

Smiling politely
Thank you ma'am

Quiet Delicate music at Low
intensity
[Normal transition]

Somewhat confused
Pardon?

Awkward
Uhhh, I made the...{0.3} I
am the chef.

div.i:
(Helens hands appear on the
table, she is leaning towards
talos (in an excited pose).
She her face is visible, old,
and bright, but still might
appear quite secluded, due
to the shadows.)

foreignObject.div:
Normal Upbeat music at High
intensity
[Normal transition]

Delighted
Oh,{0.3} you cooked this soup
yourself?

Nodding awkwardly
Yes.
Oh, wonderful!

Where did you get these ingredients
from?

I love the thymee in here,
it's so sparkly.

Shrugging awkwardly
I'm not sure...{0.3} It was
just provided to me.

It's almost as potent as the
thymee I grow at home.

Awkward
Thank you..?

div.i:
(The level of the soup is low,
but there’s still a little
bit left (transition occurs
after the first ‘.’))

foreignObject.div:
None
. . .

Quiet Upbeat music at Low intensity
[Slow transition]

Polite
Ah yes, I see that you've noticed
my hands.

quickly looking away
Ah no, I didn't mean-
They are rather...{0.3} specialized.
I know.

Quietly panicking
I-I don't mean to offend you-

Quiet Ambiance
[Slow transition]
I had normal hands,-

Gesturing at her hands
But when you do one thing,
and one thing only, you get
quite good at it.

Dejected
Unfortunately, you also tend
to loose the ability to do
other things as effectively.-

Unsure how to react
Uhhh...
Like using spoons.

Thinking of something to say
I{0.3} see.{}.{}?

div.i: (All the soup is finished)

foreignObject.div:
Normal Ambiance

(All the soup is finished)

After finishing the last spoonful
You are quite interesting to
talk to.

div.i: (Scene fades from day to evening)

foreignObject.div:
SFX: [generic] Audio boom effect
(time passing suddenly)

Mournful
Too bad that we've run out
of time,{0.3} and I cannot
stay any longer.
Will you be serving me tomorrow?

Cleaning up
I can't guarantee that.-

But you never know what tomorrow
holds.

Deeply considering something
That is quite true dear.

Leaning forward
I still have a small farm by-the-by.
It's in quite a state now,-

I don't have much time to look
after it any more.

Reminiscing
My nephew used to come along
and help sometimes,{0.3} but
he also had to go corporate.

div.i:

foreignObject.div:
Getting up
Ah, that's a bit unfortu-

Quiet Ambiance
[Normal transition]

Very earnest
I would love it if you were
to come by and visit.
I'll show you around the place.

You can even take back some
produce.

I have more than enough for
my needs.

Caught by surprise
I,- Ummm... Thank you,{w} I'll
think about it.

That is enough!

Stop asking so many annoying
questions.
Stop creating a fuss.

Just go back, apologize to

It's not my fault that you
can't pay attention.
Alright?

Quiet Aggressive music at Low
intensity
[Normal transition]

Deflated

Seething

NONE
...

div.i:
(New shamonion about to be
chopped, (with remnants of
blood, etc. still visible))

foreignObject.div:
[Generic] Chopping Sound SFX
{ambiance}

Normal Delicate music at Low
intensity
[Slow transition]

NONE
*sigh.*
The things I do for a paycheck.

Cautiously slicing down to
the anus
She's fun and personable.

Getting caught on the dangly
bit
Constantly laying it on thick.

Wiggling knife back and forth
It gets a bit much at times,
but-

Finally reaching the anus
I guess that's just me.

Lifting knife upto jaw
Everyone else seems to be very
appreciative of it.

Lacerating
So I...{0.3} Guess I might
be being a bit...

I mean, she's doing her thing,
and it's definitely working
out for her.
She's friends with everyone.

Sliding knife behind throat
She makes a great impression
on strangers

Cutting down to the stomach
She really knows how to work
the stakeholders and higher
ups.

Disemboweling
She knows the game, she knows
how to relate and communicate
and maneuver her way around
this circus.

Accidentally rupturing the
spleen
She definitely knows what she's
doing-

Quiet Delicate music at Low
intensity
[Abrupt transition]

Skipping a beat
...

Normal Delicate music at Low
intensity
[Smooth transition]

Finishing the disemboweling
She does party a bit too much
though.

Trying to scoop out the mess
And that's fine, that's fine.

Grabbing a towel
Some people are just into those
kind of things.

Wiping up the remainder
She enjoys drinking.

Harrasing organs
Plenty of guys approach her.

[Generic] Chopping Sound SFX
Stops
(fades out slowly)

Removing the appendix
Lots of interesting conversation.
[ brief pause ]

SFX: Sharp, loud chop-thud
onto cutting board [plays
with next line]

Silence
[Abrupt transition]

Normal Delicate music at Medium
intensity
[Slow transition]
(music abruptly fades out,
then slowly fades back in)

Chopping balls in half
She's definitely found her
place here.

div.i:
(without Sparkles. Peels and
blood splatters and guts are
everywhere.)

foreignObject.div:
[ Brief pause ]
as the scene transitions from
a chopped shamonion to a new
shamonion

some sort of neutral transition
indicator SFX (like a gentle

div.i:

foreignObject.div:
[Generic] Chopping Sound SFX
{ambiance}
at Normal Volume
[normal transition]

Cutting off unnecessary jewelry
They're trying to introduce
me into that lifestyle.

Peeling back thick fur coat
But unfortunately, that's not
my thing...

Extracting shamonion
It's really not my thing.

Wiping off goo
Normally, I would just take
it as a sign to leave-

Slicing down to the anus
But unfortunately, the job
market isn't actually as..,{0.3}
diverse as I was expecting.

Lacerating
At least, not right now.
So here I am.

Slicing into neck
But, all things considered-

Cutting down to stomach
It's not that bad.

Disemboweling in 'circles'
She's not that bad either.
Her world is nice.

Harrasing organs
It would be nice to party and
socialize.

Removing appendix
Join that crowd of happy smiling
faces.

[Generic] Chopping Sound SFX
Stops
(fades out slowly)

SFX: Sharp, loud chop-thud
onto cutting board [plays
with next line]

Silence
[Abrupt transition]

Normal Ambiance
[Slow transition]
(Music fades out, then slowly
fades back in)

Chopping balls in half
That is nice. Everything is
nice. This is just how things
work.

div.i:
(with No Sparkles, peels and
blood splatters and guts everywhere.)

foreignObject.div:
None
. . .

Quiet Aggressive music at Low
intensity
[Slow transition]
(CrossFade/ music slowly increases
in intensity and volume over
the next few lines)

Siren Sound SFX [generic sound
effect] (starts playing quietly,
and slowly increases in volume,
over the next few lines)

Pausing
My bullshit detector is just
going off the fucking charts
right now.
That stupid siren.

That screaming, pounding alarm
bell.

Breathing heavily
I just-
It's just-

It just keeps going on and
on at the back of my head.

Breathing very heavily
It keeps telling me-

It just keeps telling me to
get out.
To leave as soon as I can.

Fists clenched tightly
Somethings wrong.
This isn't ideal.
Find something else.
Don't do this.

Rapid twitching
And it doesn't tell me why!
why?
Why?
WHY!?

It's.{0.3} So.{0.3} Bloody.{0.3}
Unbearable.

Loud Aggressive music at High
intensity
(Music gradually increases
to this point)

SFX: [generic siren sound],
gradually increases to this
point at Loud volume
Ahhhh!

SFX: [Generic thud] (hitting
the cutting board)
Loud volume

SFX: [Generic siren sound]
cuts out abruptly
(with maybe some lingering
reverb tails?)

div.i: ({Hpunch})

foreignObject.div:
Normal Ambiance
[Slow transition]
(CrossFade/ music slowly fades
away)
[ Awkward Pause ]

NONE
Soo...
How's everything going so far?

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [__X]
[Fast transition]

Normal Upbeat music at Low
intensity
[Normal transition]

Glancing back at me
Make sure you use an upwards
motion for that.

Gesturing with knife
Like this, it has to be like
this.

Eyebrow raised
Alright?
You got all that?

Quiet Upbeat music at Low intensity
[Normal transition]

Head empty, no thoughts
Uhhh... Yeah, yeah.

Somewhat overwhelmed
Got it.

Stephanie is Slightly Sad at
[__X]
[Slow transition]

Skeptical
So... You can handle *all*
of this by yourself?
Sure- sure.

Doubtful
Alright then.

If you have difficulty remembering,
make sure to write it down,
alright?
Yeah alright.

Stephanie is Slightly Joyful
at [__X]
[Normal transition]

Gesturing at herself arrogantly
I'm fine. I don't need to,
I have a very good memory.

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [__X]
[Normal transition]

Waving hand around in circles
But if you're struggling with
this stuff... just..-

Make sure that you're taking
notes.

Quick nod
Okay.

Normal Generic music
[Slow transition]
(CrossFade)

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [__>]
[Normal transition]

Returning back to other tasks
And don't forget to wash the
karots.

Furrowed brow
This is the third time I'm
reminding you.

Meek
Yeah, I'll work on that now.

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [__>]
[Normal transition]
(Moves slightly offscreen)

Leaving for another task
Okay good.

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [__X]
[Slow transition]
(Slides back from being slightly
offscreen)

Glancing back
and also umm...

Stephanie is Slightly Sad at
[__X]
[Normal transition]

Waving hand in circles
Just call me if you need any
help, alright?

Grabbing another shamonion
Okie dokie, artichokie.

Stephanie is Quite Disgusted
at [__>]
[Normal transition]

Looking back conceitedly
Ewww, no,{0.3} don't choke
me.

Faux snobbishness
Hah, as if I wanted to.

Stephanie is Slightly Disgusted
at [__X]
[Normal transition]

Sneering
I'd prefer someone who isn't,
you know,{w=0.3} quite as
hairy.

Scowling
Well good then; I wasn't offering.

Stephanie is Quite Joyful at
[__>]
[Normal transition]

Flipping hair
Ppfft, as if you could.

Stephanie exits the scene at
right.
[ Awkward Pause ]

div.i:
(Chopped Shamonion Rings with
animated Sparkles, peels and
blood splatters and guts everywhere.)

foreignObject.div:
the cutting board has beautifully
made star shaped onion rings
on it (with an animated sparkle
effect on top)
[with onion peels to the side,
blood splaters everywhere
and guts lying all over the
place..]

Kitchen theme [generic] starts
fading in

Gesturing at the shamonion
rings
See, look at all these beautiful
stars.

Brimming with pride
That's how it's done!

Pointing non-specifically
You could also make little
sun shapes too-

You just have to separate the
fagiggly gland from the gizzard,
before working on the liver.

Stephanie is Slightly Surprised
at [__X]

Hands raised in confusion
No! You're supposed to cut
them in circles, those are
ovals.

Stephanie is Neutral? at [__X]
[Slow transition]

Normal Generic music
[Normal transition]
(Music Resumes)

Trying a different technique
Right, so like-

Silence
[Abrupt transition]

Stephanie is Very Angry at
[__X]
[Abrupt transition]
(Starts shaking slightly)

Outraged
What!? No! That's worse!

Quiet Ambiance at Low intensity
[Slow transition]
(fades in quietly)

Have you never peeled shamonions
before!?

Meek
Well I, did-

I have done it before,{0.3}
yeah.
I mean-
I'm not *that* bad at it.-
yeah.

Stephanie is Quite Disgusted
at [__X]
[Fast transition]

Facepalming
Ughh,-

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [_<_]
[Normal transition]
(Slides across screen from
right to center)

Leaning over my shoulder
Here, let me show you.

Normal Suspenseful music at
Low intensity
[Slow transition]

Grabbing a new shamonion
Make sure you're paying attention-

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [_X_]
[Normal transition]
(Stephanie slides a bit right)

Eyebrows raised
Alright?

Stephanie is Quite Angry at
[_X_]
[Fast transition]

Annoyed
Are you looking?

Quiet Ambiance
[Fast transition]
(Music Stops)

Nodding
yeah, yeah- I'm looking, I'm
looking.

Normal Suspenseful music at
Low intensity
[Slow transition]
(Music Resumes)

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [_<_]
[Slow transition]
(Stephanie slides back to dead
center)

Satiated
Okay good.

Composing thoughts
So, you see-
It's actually quite simple.

Manhandling shamonion
First, you have to grab the
head,
like this, alright?

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [_X_]
[Normal transition]

Giving a better view of her
grip
Look at how I'm holding this.

Quiet Suspenseful music at
Low intensity
[Immediate transition]
(Music becomes quieter)

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [_X_]
[Fast transition]

Slight scowl
Are you following me?

Nodding
Yeah, yeah I see that.

Normal Suspenseful music at
Low intensity
[Normal transition]
(Music Restored/Resumes)

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [_<_]
[Normal transition]

Resuming composure
Alright then.

Positioning knife
Now, you have to do a really
thin slice,-

Using only the tip of the blade
from the top, all the way down
to the anus.

Placing knife on jaw
Then come back up here,-

Gently painting on lacerations
and draw a few pretty little
X's all over the cheeks.

Maneuvering between the throat
and neck muscles
Then gently slide the knife
in, like this.

Get behind the throat, without
breaking it,-

Holding the knife at a perfect
vertical
and slice all the way down
to the stomach.

Cutting in circles
Disembowel, separate the small
and large intestines,-

Normal Suspenseful music at
Medium intensity
[Normal transition]
(Music increases intensity)

Stephanie is Slightly Angry
at [_X_]
[Fast transition]

Looking back at me disapprovingly
in circular motions! Make sure
you use circular motions!
Alright?

Slightly confused
yeah okay.

Normal Suspenseful music at
Low intensity
[Normal transition]
(Music Restored)

Stephanie is Slightly Trusting
at [_<_]
[Normal transition]

Gentle twitching
Then you tickle the liver.

Short jabs
Poke the lungs.

Quick flicking motion
Remove the appendix.

Sharp, loud chop-thud onto
cutting board.
Plays immediately after {0.3}
pause

Silence
[Abrupt transition]
Plays immediately after {0.3}
pause

Wincing
Yikes.

Normal Upbeat music at Medium
intensity
[Slow transition]

Stephanie is Very Joyful at
[__<]
[Smooth transition]
(Slides across screen)

Stepping back
And there you go!
